AccessControl for role management and Pausable for emergency stops.","events":{"AdminTransferAccepted(address,address)":{"params":{"newAdmin":"The new admin.","oldAdmin":"The previous admin."}},"AdminTransferProposed(address,address)":{"params":{"currentAdmin":"The current admin proposing the transfer.","newAdmin":"The proposed new admin."}},"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` v3.1._"},"RoleChangeCancelled(bytes32)":{"params":{"actionId":"The identifier of the cancelled action."}},"RoleChangeExecuted(bytes32,bytes32,address,bool)":{"params":{"account":"The account revoked."}},"RoleChangeProposed(bytes32,bytes32,address,bool,uint256)":{"params":{"account":"The account affected.","actionId":"The identifier of the proposed action.","executableAfter":"Timestamp when the action can be executed.","isGrant":"True for grant, false for revoke.","role":"The role to grant or revoke."}},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by Reverts if action is not proposed or timelock is not expired. Inherits from Pausable."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"proposeAdminTransfer(address)":{"details":"Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if paused, account is invalid, or action is already proposed. Emits RoleChangeProposed event.","params":{"account":"The account to lose the role.","role":"The role to revoke."}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Reverts to enforce use of proposeRevokeRole.","params":{"account":"The account renouncing the role.","role":"The role to renounce."}},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Reverts to enforce use of proposeRevokeRole.","params":{"account":"The account to lose the role.","role":"The role to revoke."}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}."},"unpause()":{"details":"Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. "bzz-raw://4ddabb16009cd17eaca3143feadf450ac13e72919ebe2ca50e00f61cb78bc004","dweb:/ipfs/QmSPwPxX7d6TTWakN5jy5wsaGkS1y9TW8fuhGSraMkLk2B"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe2e337e6dde9ef6b680e07338c493ebea1b5fd09b43424112868e9cc1706bca7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6df0ddf21ce9f58271bdfaa85cde98b200ef242a05a3f85c2bc10a8294800a92","dweb:/ipfs/QmRK2Y5Yc6BK7tGKkgsgn3aJEQGi5aakeSPZvS65PV8Xp3"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Strings.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3088eb2868e8d13d89d16670b5f8612c4ab9ff8956272837d8e90106c59c14a0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b81d9ff6559ea5c47fc573e17ece6d9ba5d6839e213e6ebc3b4c5c8fe4199d7f","dweb:/ipfs/QmPCW1bFisUzJkyjroY3yipwfism9RRCigCcK1hbXtVM8n"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/ERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd10975de010d89fd1c78dc5e8a9a7e7f496198085c151648f20cba166b32582b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fb0048dee081f6fffa5f74afc3fb328483c2a30504e94a0ddd2a5114d731ec4d","dweb:/ipfs/QmZptt1nmYoA5SgjwnSgWqgUSDgm4q52Yos3xhnMv3MV43"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x447a5f3ddc18419d41ff92b3773fb86471b1db25773e07f877f548918a185bf1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://be161e54f24e5c6fae81a12db1a8ae87bc5ae1b0ddc805d82a1440a68455088f","dweb:/ipfs/QmP7C3CHdY9urF4dEMb9wmsp1wMxHF6nhA2yQE5SKiPAdy"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe4455ac1eb7fc497bb7402579e7b4d64d928b846fce7d2b6fde06d366f21c2b3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cc8841b3cd48ad125e2f46323c8bad3aa0e88e399ec62acb9e57efa7e7c8058c","dweb:/ipfs/QmSqE4mXHA2BXW58deDbXE8MTcsL5JSKNDbm23sVQxRLPS"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SignedMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf92515413956f529d95977adc9b0567d583c6203fc31ab1c23824c35187e3ddc","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c50fcc459e49a9858b6d8ad5f911295cb7c9ab57567845a250bf0153f84a95c7","dweb:/ipfs/QmcEW85JRzvDkQggxiBBLVAasXWdkhEysqypj9EaB6H2g6"]}},"version":1}

acceptAdminTransfer().details: Reverts if no transfer is proposed, timelock is not expired, or old admin lacks role. Emits AdminTransferAccepted event.

cancelRoleAction(bytes32).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if action is not proposed. Emits RoleChangeCancelled event.

params.actionId: The identifier of the proposed action.

constructor.details: Grants DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, OPERATOR_ROLE, VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, and ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE to the admin.

params._multiSigAdmin: Address of the multi-signature wallet to be granted admin roles.

executeRoleAction(bytes32).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if action is not proposed or timelock is not expired. Emits RoleChangeExecuted event.

params.actionId: The identifier of the proposed action.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Reverts to enforce use of proposeGrantRole.

params.account: The account to receive the role.

pause().details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Inherits from Pausable.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proposeAdminTransfer(address).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if paused or newAdmin is invalid. Emits AdminTransferProposed event.

params.newAdmin: The address to receive the admin role.

proposeGrantRole(bytes32,address).details: Only callable by the role admin. Reverts if paused, account is invalid, or action is already proposed. Emits RoleChangeProposed event.

params.account: The account to receive the role.

proposeRevokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Only callable by the role admin. Reverts if paused, account is invalid, or action is already proposed. Emits RoleChangeProposed event.

params.account: The account to lose the role.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Reverts to enforce use of proposeRevokeRole.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Reverts to enforce use of proposeRevokeRole.

params.account: The account to lose the role.

unpause().details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Inherits from Pausable.

MIN_TIMELOCK_DELAY().notice: Minimum timelock delay for role changes (24 hours).

constructor.notice: Initializes the contract with a multi-sig admin.

executeRoleAction(bytes32).notice: Executes a proposed role change after the timelock period.

grantRole(bytes32,address).notice: Overrides grantRole to disable direct calls.

pendingAdminTransfers(address).notice: Mapping of new admin address to pending admin transfer.

pendingRoleActions(bytes32).notice: Mapping of action ID to pending role action.

proposeAdminTransfer(address).notice: Proposes transferring the DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE to a new address.

proposeGrantRole(bytes32,address).notice: Proposes granting a role to an account, subject to timelock.

proposeRevokeRole(bytes32,address).notice: Proposes revoking a role from an account, subject to timelock.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).notice: Overrides renounceRole to disable direct calls.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).notice: Overrides revokeRole to disable direct calls.
